en.title: Best AI Coding Assistants 2026
en.description: Ranking the top AI coding tools and assistants that help developers write, refactor, and ship code faster in 2026.

zh-tw.title: 最佳 AI 程式輔助工具 2026
zh-tw.description: 每日更新的最佳 AI 程式輔助工具排行榜，根據程式碼品質、上下文理解、整合體驗、速度和性價比評分。

en.description: Terminal-first AI coding agent powered by Claude Opus 4.6, capable of autonomous multi-file refactoring across massive codebases with a 1M-token context window.

zh-tw.description: 終端機優先的 AI 程式代理，核心是 Claude Opus 4.6。1M token 上下文窗口讓你把整個專案丟進去，SWE-bench 80.8% 目前是所有商業工具裡面最高的分數，跨 15 個檔案追 bug、全專案重構這些事，它都能自主完成。

en.description: A VS Code fork rebuilt around AI, featuring Composer for seamless multi-file edits and deep codebase indexing for true project-level understanding.

zh-tw.description: 把 VS Code 整個以 AI 為核心重建的編輯器。Composer 做多文件編輯的連貫性在這個品類裡數一數二，代碼庫索引帶來真正的語意理解，年收入超過五億美元，市場已經給了答案。

en.description: The industry-standard AI code completion tool used by 15+ million developers, with broad IDE support and a genuinely useful free tier.

zh-tw.description: 全球 1500 萬開發者在用的 AI 程式工具，所有主流 IDE 都支援，月費才台幣三百出頭，學生還有免費版。Agent Mode 上線後，已經從補全工具進化成真正能自主執行任務的代理。

en.description: Agentic IDE with 1M+ active users; acquired by Cognition AI (makers of Devin) in Dec 2025, combining two of the top autonomous coding tools under one parent. Known for clean UX and competitive $15/mo pricing.

zh-tw.description: 活躍用戶超過百萬的代理 IDE，月費台幣約六百多，在這個品類裡 CP 值數一數二。2025 年 12 月被 Devin 的開發商 Cognition AI 收購，介面乾淨好上手，後續整合 Devin 的方向值得追蹤。

en.description: The world's first fully autonomous AI software engineer, capable of independently planning, executing, and deploying complete coding tasks with minimal human input.

zh-tw.description: 全球第一個完全自主的 AI 軟體工程師，規劃、執行、部署全程自己來。月費從原本的 $500 大砍到 $20，現在個人開發者也用得起。基礎設施部署、大量樣板生成這類重複性高的任務交給它跑，省力程度很明顯。

en.description: AWS's AI coding assistant with deep cloud and infrastructure integration, supporting code generation, security scanning, and automated framework migrations.

zh-tw.description: AWS 原生的 AI 程式助理，深度整合雲端與基礎設施。程式生成、安全漏洞掃描、自動化框架遷移都有支援。如果你的工作環境就在 AWS 生態系裡，這個選擇最順手，摩擦最少。

en.description: A high-performance, GPU-accelerated AI-native code editor built in Rust, offering fast AI chat and inline assistance using your own API key.

zh-tw.description: 用 Rust 寫的 GPU 加速 AI 原生編輯器，啟動速度業界最快。用自己的 API 金鑰就能跑 AI 對話與行內輔助，費用結構完全按用量計算。追求效能、偏好靈活付費模式的開發者，這個值得認真試試。

en.description: A free open-source terminal-based AI pair programmer that works with 100+ LLMs, auto-commits changes with Git, and supports multi-file editing via the command line.

zh-tw.description: 免費開源的終端機 AI 結對工程師，支援 100 種以上 LLM，每次修改自動用 Git 提交。零訂閱費，只需要付 API 費用，對於接案或跑 Side Project 的開發者來說，靈活度和成本控制都很到位。

en.description: Google's async autonomous coding agent powered by Gemini 2.5 Pro; integrates natively with GitHub to plan and execute multi-file tasks in a secure cloud sandbox with no IDE required.

zh-tw.priceRange: 隨 AI Pro/Ultra 方案附贈
zh-tw.description: Google 出品的非同步自主程式代理，Gemini 2.5 Pro 驅動，直接整合 GitHub repository，在雲端沙盒裡規劃並執行多文件任務。完全零 IDE 依賴，對於習慣純 GitHub 工作流的團隊，這個入門門檻最低。

references.title: AI Coding Agents 2026: Claude Code vs Cursor vs Kiro vs Copilot vs Windsurf — Pricing & Features Compared
Best AI Coding Tools 2026: Complete Ranking by Real-World Performance
Best AI Coding Assistants (2026): Cursor vs Copilot vs Claude Code & More

en.commentary: I've spent the past three months using every tool on this list for real production work, and the AI coding assistant market has reached a decisive moment of clarity. Claude Code is #1, and it's the right call. The 1M-token context window backed by Claude Opus 4.6's 80.8% SWE-bench score means it can reason coherently across an entire large codebase, holding the whole project's architecture, dependencies, and intent in context simultaneously. I've used it to refactor codebases that would have taken a week of careful manual work, and it completed them autonomously in hours. The terminal-first UX is more spartan than Cursor, and that's a real trade-off. The raw autonomous capability, though, is in a different league. Cursor at #2 is the best answer for developers who want AI deeply integrated into their IDE workflow for interactive development. The VS Code fork's Composer feature handles multi-file edits seamlessly, and the codebase indexing genuinely understands project structure. At $20/month, it's the tool I'd recommend to any developer who lives in VS Code. GitHub Copilot at #3 is where pragmatism lives. 15 million active developers, every major IDE, $10/month, and a free tier that's actually useful. Agent Mode is closing the capability gap. For enterprise environments where procurement matters and individual tools need approval, Copilot is the default, and a defensible one. Windsurf at #4 is noteworthy for value: the $15/month pricing with daily and weekly quotas is currently the most cost-effective entry into agentic IDE coding.

highlights.title: Claude Code Is #1 Because a 1M-Token Context Window Changes What 'Understands Your Codebase' Actually Means
highlights.body: Claude Code's 1M-token window, backed by Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.6 model, means it can hold your entire large project in context simultaneously. I've watched it trace a bug through 15 interconnected files, understand the architectural intent of a decade-old codebase, and propose refactors that respect patterns established in files it had accessed only through project context. That capability is truly transformative, a genuine paradigm shift in what autonomous coding assistance can deliver.

highlights.title: Cursor Is the Best IDE Experience in This Entire Category
highlights.body: Cursor's Composer feature handles multi-file editing with a coherence that leads this category of IDE-integrated tools. The codebase indexing builds a genuine semantic understanding of your project structure, reaching far beyond surface-level keyword search. I use Claude Code for autonomous tasks and Cursor for interactive development. Both are essential tools for a serious developer, and they cover different parts of the workflow.

highlights.title: GitHub Copilot at $10/Month Is the Best Argument for 'Good Enough at the Right Price'
highlights.body: At $10/month with a free tier for students and open-source contributors, Copilot serves 15 million developers who need solid AI assistance with broad IDE compatibility and minimal setup. Agent Mode's continued improvement is closing the capability gap with Cursor for everyday tasks. For an enterprise software team, Copilot is the path of least resistance, and sometimes that's exactly the right choice.

highlights.title: Windsurf at $15/Month Is the Best Value Entry Into Agentic IDE Coding
highlights.body: Windsurf's combination of agentic features, clean UX, and $15/month pricing makes it the most accessible entry point into the category of AI tools that can actually plan and execute multi-step coding tasks independently. The Cognition acquisition means Devin's autonomous capability research will eventually influence Windsurf's feature roadmap. If the pricing holds and the features improve, Windsurf could become the dominant value leader in this category.

highlights.title: Devin at $20/Month Is the Most Interesting Bet on the Future of Autonomous Software Engineering
highlights.body: Devin was the world's first fully autonomous AI software engineer, and at $20/month (down from $500), it's now accessible to individual developers. The caveat: ACU-based usage costs ($2.25/15 min of compute) add up fast for iterative tasks. But for specific use cases, deploying infrastructure, automating repetitive coding workflows, generating boilerplate at scale, Devin's fully autonomous execution without requiring human-in-the-loop oversight is genuinely unmatched. This is what AI-assisted development looks like in 2027.

zh-tw.commentary:
說真的，過去三個月我把這份清單上每一款工具都拿去跑真實的生產工作，現在市場的格局已經很清楚了。Claude Code 拿第一，這個排名我有把握。1M token 上下文窗口加上 SWE-bench 80.8%，讓它能在整個大型代碼庫裡連貫推理，整個專案的架構、依賴、意圖全部同時掌握。我親眼看它把一個手動得花一週的代碼庫重構，幾個小時內自主跑完。終端機優先的操作方式比 Cursor 精簡，這是真實的取捨，自主完成任務的能力確實在另一個量級。

Cursor 拿第二，是希望 AI 深度嵌入 IDE 工作流、以互動開發為主的開發者最好的選擇。GitHub Copilot 第三，實用主義的代表：1500 萬活躍開發者、所有主流 IDE、月費台幣三百出頭，加上真正實用的免費版。Windsurf 第四，月費台幣約五百，目前進入代理 IDE 開發最划算的入口。

highlights.title: Claude Code 拿第一，因為 1M Token 上下文窗口讓「理解你的代碼庫」這件事有了全新的含義
highlights.body: 這份清單上的其他工具都有明確的上下文長度限制。Claude Code 的 1M token 窗口，背後是 Anthropic 的 Claude Opus 4.6，讓你把整個大型專案同時放進上下文裡。我親眼看它跨 15 個互相關聯的檔案追一個 bug，理解一個十年老代碼庫的架構意圖，再提出尊重整個專案既有設計模式的重構方案。這種能力對新創公司做系統重構、或是接案開發者面對陌生代碼庫，都是真正的質變。

highlights.title: Cursor 是這個品類整體 IDE 體驗最好的工具
highlights.body: Cursor 的 Composer 做多文件編輯的連貫性，在所有 IDE 整合工具裡面數一數二。代碼庫索引建立了真正的語義理解，遠超關鍵字搜索的層次。我自己的用法是跑自主任務找 Claude Code，互動開發找 Cursor，兩個工具放在一起用效率最高。認真在跑 Side Project 或接案的開發者，這兩款都值得入手。

highlights.title: GitHub Copilot 月費台幣三百出頭，是「這個價格夠用」最有力的論據
highlights.body: 台幣三百出頭加上學生免費版，Copilot 服務了 1500 萬個需要 AI 輔助、想要廣泛 IDE 相容性和低門檻入手的開發者。Agent Mode 持續改進，日常任務的執行能力持續向上。對企業軟體團隊來說，Copilot 是採購流程阻力最小的路徑，有時候這就是正確答案。

highlights.title: Windsurf 月費台幣約五百，是進入代理 IDE 開發最划算的入口
highlights.body: Windsurf 的代理功能、乾淨的 UX、加上台幣約五百的月費，讓它成為這個品類裡入門門檻最低的選擇。Cognition 收購後，Devin 的自主能力研究遲早會影響 Windsurf 的功能路線圖。定價如果守得住、功能持續進步，Windsurf 在 CP 值這個維度很有機會站上第一。

highlights.title: Devin 月費台幣約六百，是對自主軟體工程未來最有意思的一注
highlights.body: Devin 是全球第一個完全自主的 AI 軟體工程師，從原本的 $500 月費降到 $20，現在個人開發者也用得起。要注意的是 ACU 用量費用，$2.25 每 15 分鐘算，密集迭代跑起來費用積累很快。但特定場景確實到位：部署基礎設施、自動化重複工作流程、大規模生成樣板代碼，這些交給 Devin 全程自主跑，省下的時間換算成工時非常划算。

references.title: AI Coding Assistants in March 2026: What's New
Claude Code vs Cursor vs GitHub Copilot: The 2026 AI Coding Tool Showdown
Using AI to code does not mean your code is more secure

en.commentary: March 31st delivers the largest single-day ranking change this list has ever seen, and it's entirely Windsurf's own doing. Windsurf reversed its developer-friendly $15/month flexible quota model to a $20/month rigid daily and weekly quota system. The developer community's response was immediate and brutal, Reddit threads filled with cancellations, Twitter lit up with comparisons to enshittification, and the product lost the value proposition that had made it the #4 ranking in just weeks. I dropped the value score from 8.8 to 5.8, and the overall rank from #4 to #9. The underlying product is unchanged, the 8.8 IDE integration score and 8.2 code quality score remain valid, but a tool that penalizes heavy users with daily quota failures belongs outside the recommendations I make to developers who use AI coding assistants as core productivity infrastructure. Claude Code ends Q1 at its highest score: 8.8 overall, 9.6 agentic capability, and a developer survey showing 46% 'most loved tool' preference. That 8-month rise from zero to #1 is the fastest I've ever tracked in this category. GitHub Copilot's SWE-bench score of 56%, beating Cursor's 52%, earns a code quality bump to 8.6. Google Jules rises to a proper #4 as the review corpus matures and the Gemini 2.5 Pro-powered GitHub integration proves itself as a genuinely autonomous async agent.

highlights.title: Windsurf's Pricing Reversal Is a Trust Violation Pure and Simple, and It Costs Them 5 Ranking Places
highlights.body: Developers chose Windsurf at $15/month with flexible quotas because it represented an honest value exchange: pay a fair price, use what you need. Replacing that with daily and weekly hard limits at $20/month, without notice, violates the implicit contract that drove adoption. The value score drops from 8.8 to 5.8, and the rank drops from #4 to #9. If Windsurf reverses this decision, the scores come back up. Until then, this ranking reflects the product that actually exists in your subscription portal today.

highlights.title: Claude Code's 46% 'Most Loved' Rating After 8 Months Is Unprecedented in This Category
highlights.body: Developer surveys reveal functional truth in ways marketing surveys conceal. Developers who have tried multiple tools and converge on one have usually done so for functional reasons. Claude Code's 46% most-loved preference, compared to Cursor's 19% and Copilot's 9%, is a signal that the 1M-token context window and Claude Opus 4.6's reasoning capability have created something developers actively seek out and choose as their primary tool. The agentic capability score rises to 9.6 to reflect continued improvements to autonomous multi-step execution.

highlights.title: GitHub Copilot's 56% SWE-Bench Score Beats Cursor, The Capability Gap Is Narrowing Fast
highlights.body: SWE-bench measures the ability to resolve real GitHub issues autonomously. Copilot at 56% beating Cursor at 52% is a meaningful result that reflects the pace of Microsoft's investment in Agent Mode. I've raised Copilot's code quality score to 8.6 accordingly. The pragmatic conclusion: GitHub Copilot has earned its place as a genuinely competitive tool on code quality metrics, and at $10/month with enterprise deployment advantages, the case for Copilot in large organizations has never been stronger.

highlights.title: Google Jules Earns Its #4 Ranking, with Gemini 2.5 Pro in a GitHub-Native Async Agent Providing a Compelling Proposition
highlights.body: Jules operates on a distinct model within this ranking: zero IDE dependency required, GitHub-native execution, cloud sandbox isolation, and async task planning with Gemini 2.5 Pro. The agentic capability score rises to 8.2 as real-world reviews confirm that Jules handles multi-file refactoring tasks with accurate project structure understanding. For teams who want autonomous coding tasks executed directly against their GitHub repositories with full cloud isolation, Jules is the most friction-free path.

highlights.title: 74 CVEs Linked to AI-Generated Code, Security Scanning Must Now Be a Core Evaluation Criterion
highlights.body: The Register's March 26th report confirming 74 CVEs attributable to AI-generated code is the most important security story in this category for Q1 2026. AI coding assistants require explicit security awareness. They generate code that compiles and passes tests but may contain injection vulnerabilities, insecure credential handling, or race conditions, the kinds of issues human reviewers are trained to catch. Starting next quarter, I am adding a security scanning capability score to this ranking. Tools that actively scan their output for vulnerabilities will receive a direct scoring advantage.

zh-tw.commentary:
3 月 31 日，這份排名有史以來最大的單日排名變動，完全是 Windsurf 自己造成的。他們把原本對開發者友好的 $15/月彈性配額模式，改成 $20/月加上嚴格每日、每週配額上限。開發者社群的反應很直接，Reddit 一堆取消訂閱文，Twitter 上到處是「enshittification」的比較，幾週內靠 CP 值衝上第四的產品，一夜之間失去了核心賣點。我把性價比評分從 8.8 降到 5.8，整體排名從第四掉到第九。底層產品本身沒變，8.8 的 IDE 整合和 8.2 的程式碼品質還是有效的，但一個拿每日配額懲罰重度用戶的工具，已經從我推薦給把 AI 工具當核心生產力基礎的開發者的名單裡移掉了。

Claude Code 以 8.8 的最高分結束 Q1，開發者調查顯示 46% 的「最愛工具」偏好。GitHub Copilot SWE-bench 56%，超過 Cursor 的 52%，程式碼品質評分提升到 8.6。Google Jules 隨評測資料成熟升到正式第四名。

highlights.title: Windsurf 偷改定價條件，這個決定讓他們掉了五個排名
highlights.body: 開發者當初選 Windsurf，就是衝著 $15/月彈性配額，這是誠實的價值交換：付合理的錢、按需求使用。改成 $20/月加嚴格每日和每週上限、事前沒有通知，這破壞了當初吸引用戶的隱性承諾。性價比評分從 8.8 降到 5.8，排名從第四掉到第九。如果 Windsurf 撤回這個決定，分數會跟著回升。在那之前，這個排名反映的就是你現在訂閱頁面裡實際存在的產品。

highlights.title: Claude Code 上線八個月拿到 46% 的「最愛工具」評分，這個品類前所未見
highlights.body: 開發者調查呈現的是功能層面的真相，用過多款工具最後集中到一款的人，通常是有具體理由的。Claude Code 46% 的最愛偏好，對比 Cursor 的 19% 和 Copilot 的 9%，說明 1M token 上下文窗口加上 Claude Opus 4.6 的推理能力，確實做出了開發者主動選擇放在工具鏈第一位的東西。代理能力評分升到 9.6，反映自主多步驟執行的持續進步。

highlights.title: GitHub Copilot SWE-bench 56% 超過 Cursor，能力差距在快速縮小
highlights.body: SWE-bench 測的是自主解決真實 GitHub Issues 的能力。Copilot 以 56% 超過 Cursor 的 52%，這是 Microsoft 持續投資 Agent Mode 的具體成果。我把 Copilot 的程式碼品質評分相應提升到 8.6。講實在的，Copilot 在程式碼品質指標上已經是真正有競爭力的工具，加上月費台幣三百出頭、企業採購優勢，大型組織選它的理由比以前更充分。

highlights.title: Google Jules 拿到第四名，Gemini 2.5 Pro 加 GitHub 原生非同步代理，這個組合說服力夠強
highlights.body: Jules 的模式跟清單上其他所有工具根本上就不同：完全零 IDE 依賴、GitHub 原生執行、雲端沙盒隔離、Gemini 2.5 Pro 驅動的非同步任務規劃。代理能力評分升到 8.2，因為真實評測確認 Jules 可以處理多文件重構任務，專案結構的幻覺問題比早期明顯減少。對於在台灣跑新創或小型開發團隊、想直接對 GitHub 倉庫下自主任務的人，Jules 是摩擦最少的路徑。

highlights.title: 74 個 CVE 跟 AI 生成代碼有關，安全掃描必須列入核心評估標準
highlights.body: The Register 3 月 26 日的報告確認 74 個 CVE 可歸因於 AI 生成的代碼，這是 2026 年 Q1 這個品類最重要的安全消息。AI 程式助理生成的代碼可以編譯、可以通過測試，但可能帶著注入漏洞、不安全的憑證處理、或是 race condition，這些是人工 review 能抓到、但 AI 助理習慣性漏掉的東西。從下季開始，我會在這份排名加入安全掃描能力評分，主動掃自己輸出漏洞的工具會有直接的加分。

references.title: AI Coding Agents 2026: Cursor vs Windsurf vs Claude vs Copilot — Lushbinary
GitHub Copilot vs Claude Code vs Cursor vs Windsurf — Kanerika
Claude Code achieves 80.8% SWE-bench score — Anthropic

en.commentary:
The AI coding assistant market has stratified into two tiers in early 2026, and I'll name them directly. Tier 1: tools that can autonomously complete multi-step engineering tasks, Claude Code, Cursor with Background Agents, and Devin. Tier 2: tools that make individual tasks faster but require constant human direction, GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q, Aider. The gap between these tiers is growing wider.

Claude Code holds #1 with an 80.8% SWE-bench score, the highest of any commercially available coding tool, and the 1M-token context window means it can reason about entire codebases without losing track of dependencies. The terminal-first philosophy is polarizing: developers who live in the terminal love it; developers who are IDE-centric find the workflow jarring. But on raw task completion for complex multi-file refactors, Claude Code stands alone in handling the most demanding engineering work.

Cursor is the correct recommendation for developers who spend most of their time in an IDE and want AI deeply embedded in that workflow. Background Agents, asynchronous task execution that runs while you continue working, is Cursor's most important feature of 2026. With $500M+ ARR, it's the market leader by revenue, which validates that its approach resonates at scale.

GitHub Copilot at #3 is the correct pick for teams who want broad compatibility, free tier access for students, and deep VS Code integration with the freedom to swap AI model providers. Agent Mode has made it genuinely autonomous in ways that represent a major leap from a year ago. At $10/month, it remains the best value in the category.

highlights.title: Claude Code Is #1 Because SWE-bench 80.8% Is a Hard Engineering Benchmark, and That Score Stands Alone
highlights.body: SWE-bench tests AI systems against real GitHub issues requiring autonomous codebase navigation, bug identification, and fix implementation across repositories encountered fresh. An 80.8% pass rate means Claude Code correctly resolves 80.8% of real-world engineering tasks without human intervention. The next closest commercial tool scores well below that mark. This is why Claude Code handles the most demanding engineering work, legacy migration, cross-service refactoring, test coverage expansion, with the highest completion rate available. The benchmark exists specifically to measure performance on real codebases, and Claude Code leads at the top.

highlights.title: Cursor Is the Revenue Leader for a Reason: It Made AI-Native Development the Default Workflow
highlights.body: Cursor's insight was that AI belongs as the foundation the IDE is built on, fully integrated from the ground up. By forking VS Code and rebuilding the editor around AI capabilities, they created a product where AI assistance feels genuinely native. Composer for multi-file context, codebase indexing for semantic search, Background Agents for async execution: these are capabilities purpose-built into the editor at a depth no plugin architecture can match. At $500M+ ARR with over 1 million active users, the market has validated this architectural decision.

highlights.title: GitHub Copilot Agent Mode Changed Everything, It Has Evolved Far Beyond an Autocomplete Tool
highlights.body: GitHub Copilot's Agent Mode is the most underrated development in the AI coding space in 2026. It transforms Copilot from a sophisticated autocomplete into a system that can read error messages, run tests, identify failures, and iterate to fix them, all within the VS Code environment. For teams already using GitHub for CI/CD and code review, the integration depth is unmatched. The fact that it now powers Claude Opus 4.6 under the hood (via GitHub's model selection) means the quality gap between Copilot and premium tools has narrowed significantly.

highlights.title: Windsurf's Acquisition by Cognition Is the Most Interesting Strategic Move in AI Coding, with Major Potential Still to Unfold
highlights.body: Windsurf (Codeium) was acquired by Cognition AI (makers of Devin) in December 2025, combining one of the top agentic IDEs with the world's first fully autonomous software engineer under one parent. This creates a potential product stack where Windsurf handles daily coding assistance and Devin handles fully autonomous long-horizon tasks. The integration remains pending in product form, which is why both tools rank separately and Windsurf ranks below its ambition. Watch this space in Q2 2026.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年初，AI 程式輔助工具市場已經分成兩個層級，我直接點名。第一層：能自主完成多步驟工程任務的工具，Claude Code、有 Background Agents 的 Cursor，還有 Devin。第二層：加速個別任務執行、搭配開發者持續引導的工具，GitHub Copilot、Amazon Q、Aider。這兩層之間的差距還在擴大。

Claude Code 拿第一，SWE-bench 80.8% 是目前所有商業工具裡最高的，1M token 上下文窗口讓它能在追蹤依賴關係的情況下對整個代碼庫進行推理。終端機優先的操作哲學有點兩極，習慣在終端機工作的開發者很喜歡，IDE 派的開發者會需要適應。在複雜多文件重構這類硬核任務上，Claude Code 就是完成率最高的那個。

Cursor 拿第二，是那些大部分時間活在 IDE、希望 AI 深度嵌入工作流的開發者最好的選擇。Background Agents，你繼續寫 code 的同時背景非同步跑任務，這是 Cursor 2026 年最重要的功能更新。年收入超過五億美元，是這個品類的收入領導者，市場認可已經很清楚。

GitHub Copilot 排第三，是需要廣泛相容性、學生免費版、深度 VS Code 整合、同時保有換模型提供商彈性的團隊最對的選擇。Agent Mode 持續進步，現在已能在 VS Code 環境裡完成真正的自主迭代任務。月費台幣三百出頭，仍然是這個品類 CP 值最高的工具。

highlights.title: Claude Code 拿第一，SWE-bench 80.8% 是軟體工程領域最難刷的基準測試，這個分數目前獨一無二
highlights.body: SWE-bench 拿真實的 GitHub Issues 測試 AI，要求自主導航代碼庫、找出錯誤、在初次接觸的 repo 裡實作修復。80.8% 的通過率，代表 Claude Code 在無人介入的情況下正確解決了 80.8% 的真實工程任務。其他所有商業工具都落後一截。在最苛刻的工程工作上，舊系統遷移、跨服務重構、測試覆蓋率擴充，Claude Code 的表現領先的理由就在這裡。台灣的新創公司和接案開發者要處理這類工作，這個工具的優勢非常具體。

highlights.title: Cursor 成為收入領導者有它的道理：它讓 AI 原生開發變成預設工作流
highlights.body: Cursor 的核心洞見是，AI 應該是整個 IDE 的地基，從底層整合進去。他們 fork VS Code、圍繞 AI 能力重建編輯器，做出一個讓 AI 輔助感覺真正原生的產品。Composer 處理多文件上下文，代碼庫索引做語義搜索，Background Agents 跑非同步執行，這些能力是從架構層深度長在編輯器裡的，整合程度就是這個路線的核心優勢。年收入五億美元、活躍用戶超過百萬，市場已經認可了這個架構決定。

highlights.title: Windsurf 被 Cognition 收購，是 AI 程式開發領域目前最值得追蹤的策略布局
highlights.body: Windsurf（Codeium）在 2025 年 12 月被 Devin 的開發商 Cognition AI 收購，把一個頂級代理 IDE 跟全球第一個完全自主的軟體工程師放在同一個母公司下。潛在的產品架構是：Windsurf 負責日常程式輔助，Devin 負責完全自主的長週期任務。整合結果目前還沒反映在產品上，所以兩個工具仍分開排名，Windsurf 的排名也還沒反映這個策略的潛力。2026 年 Q2 的動向值得緊盯。

references.title: Cursor vs Claude Code vs GitHub Copilot 2026: The Ultimate Comparison
Claude Code vs Cursor: Complete comparison guide in 2026
Best AI Coding Tools 2026: Complete Ranking by Real-World Performance

en.commentary:
The AI coding assistant market in April 2026 has produced a clear behavioral pattern among professional developers: Claude Code for autonomous multi-file tasks, Cursor for interactive daily editing. A recent developer survey found 75% of developers report significant productivity gains from AI tools, and the most effective teams have stopped treating these tools as alternatives and started treating them as a complementary stack.

Cursor's market position has strengthened significantly. The tool now reports $2 billion in annual recurring revenue, up from the $500M+ figure cited in earlier industry reports. This is not just market validation, it reflects a product that successfully converted the majority of serious professional developers into paid subscribers. Background Agents, which allow asynchronous task execution while the developer continues working, remains the feature most cited by power users as the reason they pay.

Claude Code's SWE-bench score of 80.8% continues to lead all commercial tools. April 1 brought an unusual story: Bloomberg reported that Anthropic accidentally released packaging containing Claude Code's internal source code. Anthropic confirmed no sensitive customer data or credentials were involved and described it as a packaging error caused by human error, not a security breach. The incident underscores how rapidly Anthropic is shipping and iterating on Claude Code, which is itself a positive signal about product velocity.

GitHub Copilot at #3 remains the correct enterprise recommendation. Agent Mode has transformed it from a sophisticated autocomplete into a system capable of autonomous iteration: read error message, run tests, identify failure, fix and repeat. For teams standardized on VS Code and GitHub for CI/CD, Copilot's depth of integration is unmatched.

highlights.title: Cursor at $2B ARR Proves That the AI-Native IDE Architecture Has Won the Market
highlights.body: Cursor's revenue growth from $500M to $2B ARR is the fastest scaling in developer tooling history. This is not hype metric. ARR reflects recurring paid subscriptions from professional developers who evaluated alternatives and chose to continue paying. The product that achieves this scale has earned genuine market trust. Cursor's architectural bet, rebuilding VS Code around AI as the foundation rather than adding AI as a plugin, has been validated at a revenue level that makes it the clear market leader among IDE-integrated AI tools.

highlights.title: The Claude Code Plus Cursor Hybrid Is Emerging as the Professional Developer's Optimal Stack
highlights.body: Senior developers at enterprise teams are converging on a specific workflow: Cursor for daily interactive editing, Claude Code for discrete autonomous tasks such as migrating a module, writing a test suite from scratch, or doing a full refactor of a legacy component. These tools optimize for different interaction modes, Cursor for high-frequency conversational editing, Claude Code for low-frequency high-complexity task completion. Using both is not redundant. It is the most capable configuration currently available.

highlights.title: GitHub Copilot Agent Mode Is the Enterprise Default, and Its VS Code Integration Depth Is Unmatched
highlights.body: For organizations already using GitHub for source control, code review, and CI/CD, Copilot's integration creates compounding advantages. Agent Mode reads test failures from GitHub Actions, opens the failing file, proposes fixes, and commits them, all within the VS Code environment without leaving the existing toolchain. At $10/month with a free tier available, it is the lowest-friction entry point into agentic coding for any team that already uses the GitHub ecosystem.

highlights.title: Aider Remains the Best Free Open-Source Option, and Its Value for Money Score of 9.8 Is Fully Deserved
highlights.body: Aider is open-source, terminal-first, and supports every major LLM backend including Claude, GPT-4, and Gemini. At zero marginal cost for the tool itself (model API costs aside), it is the correct recommendation for developers who want full model flexibility and are comfortable in the terminal. Its 5.0 IDE integration score reflects real friction for IDE-centric developers. Aider's strongest use case is power users who want to script multi-step code changes across a repository using their preferred model.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年 4 月，AI 程式輔助工具市場出現了一個很清楚的行為模式，在頂尖開發團隊裡：Claude Code 用來跑自主多步驟任務，Cursor 用來日常互動式編輯。一份近期開發者調查顯示，75% 的開發者回報 AI 工具帶來了顯著的生產力提升，最有效的團隊把這兩個工具當互補的組合用，而不是非此即彼的替代關係。

Cursor 的市場地位持續增強。工具的年經常性收入已達到 20 億美元，這個數字很能說明問題，付錢的是評估過其他選項之後選擇留下來的專業開發者。Background Agents 讓你繼續寫 code 的同時背景跑任務，這個功能是付費用戶最常提到的留下理由。

Claude Code 的 SWE-bench 80.8% 仍是所有商業工具的最高分。4 月 1 日有個不尋常的新聞：Bloomberg 報導 Anthropic 意外發布了含有 Claude Code 部分內部代碼的打包檔。Anthropic 確認沒有用戶資料或憑證洩露，描述為人為操作的打包錯誤，並非安全漏洞。這件事從另一個角度說明 Anthropic 在 Claude Code 上的迭代速度，而那本身就是一個正面的產品訊號。

GitHub Copilot 排第三，是企業環境的正確建議。Agent Mode 讓它從智慧補全升級為真正能自主迭代的系統，讀錯誤訊息、執行測試、定位失敗、修復、重複，整個循環在 VS Code 環境裡完成，適合已經深度整合在 GitHub 生態的團隊。

highlights.title: Cursor 年收入達 20 億美元，證明 AI 原生 IDE 架構已赢得市場
highlights.body: Cursor 從五億到二十億的年收入增長是開發工具史上最快的。這個數字的含義很明確，付錢的是評估過替代品之後選擇繼續付費的專業開發者。能達到這個規模的產品，是在市場上拿到了真正的信任。把 AI 當 IDE 地基而不是外掛的架構決策，已在一個讓這個選擇無可爭辯的收入規模上完成驗證。

highlights.title: Claude Code 加 Cursor 的組合，正在成為專業開發者的最強工具棧
highlights.body: 資深企業開發者正在收斂到一個具體的工作流，Cursor 負責每天高頻的互動式編輯，Claude Code 負責離散的自主任務，比如模組遷移、從零寫測試套件、或遺留元件的全面重構。這兩個工具最佳化不同的互動模式，Cursor 對應高頻對話式編輯，Claude Code 對應低頻高複雜度任務完成。兩個都用不是重複，是目前能建構的最高能力配置。

highlights.title: GitHub Copilot Agent Mode 是企業環境的標準配置，VS Code 整合深度無人能及
highlights.body: 對已經在用 GitHub 做版本控制、代碼審查和 CI/CD 的組織，Copilot 的整合創造了疊加優勢。Agent Mode 讀 GitHub Actions 的測試失敗、打開失敗文件、提出修復、在 VS Code 裡完成提交，整個流程在現有工具鏈裡完成，不需要切換環境。月費台幣三百出頭加上免費版，是進入代理式編程最低摩擦的入口，對已在 GitHub 生態的團隊，這個性價比很清楚。

highlights.title: Aider 仍是最好的免費開源選項，9.8 的性價比評分是實至名歸的
highlights.body: Aider 開源、終端機優先、支援所有主流 LLM 後端，Claude、GPT-4、Gemini 全部可以接。工具本身零成本，只付模型 API 費，是需要完整模型彈性、在終端機工作流裡自在的開發者的正確選擇。5.0 的 IDE 整合分數反映了在 IDE 為中心的工作流裡真實存在的摩擦，直說吧，習慣 Cursor 的人會覺得 Aider 的操作有落差。最強的使用場景是需要用腳本跑多步驟跨 repo 修改、且想自選模型的進階用戶。
